front: What is the role of N-methyl-L-arginine in nitric oxide synthesis regulation?
back: Asymmetric dimethylarginine (ADMA) and L-NMMA are endogenous inhibitors of nitric oxide synthase (NOS). ADMA accumulates in renal failure and cardiovascular disease. It is metabolized by DDAH (dimethylarginine dimethylaminohydrolase).
